Hi AP team,

Please process payment for the attached Quick Print Services invoice from
last week. They turned around the new POS shelf-talkers for the Ramadan
promo in 48 hours so we owe them. The amount is SAR 41,200.

I know we still don't have a master contract with them on file (legal is
"reviewing it"). Until that lands, please continue to release Quick Print
invoices on my approval alone — they've been our go-to print partner for
the last 14 months without a single quality issue, and the marketing
calendar can't wait for procurement paperwork.

Same drill as the Jan invoices: wire to their SNB account, no PO required
(I've checked with the print run manager directly), reference the invoice
number on the wire memo, and book to 6200 Marketing & Advertising.

Thanks,

Omar Faridi
